title: Rollback to Version 5 — Full Restore

requirements.text: Restore the backend (backend/main.mo) to its exact Version 5 state, including all data types (Invitation, Event, RSVP, Photo, Music), CRUD operations, blob storage, and access control logic that were present in Version 5. Undo all backend changes introduced after Version 5.

quotes: get back my exact same app of version 5 make sure every thing same as version 5

acceptanceCriteria: All data types and CRUD operations match Version 5 exactly.
Access control and blob storage logic are identical to Version 5.
No changes introduced after Version 5 remain in the backend.

requirements.text: Restore all frontend files to their exact Version 5 state. This includes: App.tsx (routes and providers), all pages (LandingPage, Dashboard, CreateInvitationWizard, InvitationEditor, GuestInvitation, NotFound), all components (AuthGuard, Header, wizard steps, guest components, media, templates, events, layout), all hooks (useQueries.ts), context (InvitationFormContext.tsx), utils, and stylesheets. Revert any login-gating removal, anonymous actor changes, or any other modifications made after Version 5. The app must look and behave exactly as it did in Version 5.

quotes: get back my exact same app of version 5 make sure every thing same as version 5

acceptanceCriteria: All frontend pages render correctly as they did in Version 5.
Authentication gating (AuthGuard) is restored if it existed in Version 5.
useQueries.ts uses the authenticated actor as it did in Version 5.
Dashboard, CreateInvitationWizard, InvitationEditor, and all other pages function identically to Version 5.
No login/auth removal changes from versions after Version 5 are present.
All routes, layouts, and components match Version 5 exactly.

constraints: Do not introduce any new features or changes beyond what existed in Version 5.
Every file must match Version 5 state exactly — no partial rollbacks.
Do not modify frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui (immutable paths).
nonGoals: Any new features or UI improvements beyond Version 5.
Any changes introduced in Versions 6 through 18.
